recommendations.title: Pacific Rim
recommendations.overview: Using massive piloted robots to combat the alien threat, earth's survivors take the fight to the invading alien force lurking in the depths of the Pacific Ocean. Nearly defenseless in the face of the relentless enemy, the forces of mankind have no ch

recommendations.title: Ultraman: Rising
recommendations.overview: A star athlete reluctantly returns home to take over his father's duties as Ultraman, shielding Tokyo from giant monsters as he becomes a legendary hero.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: Alien Warfare
recommendations.overview: A team of Navy Seals investigates a mysterious science outpost only to have to combat a squad of powerful alien soldiers.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Shin Ultraman
recommendations.overview: The Japanese government sets up a special task force to fight the giant creatures suddenly appearing across the country. Soon, the squad unexpectedly meets a giant silver humanoid who starts appearing every time a space monster attacks!

recommendations.title: Godzilla
recommendations.overview: French nuclear tests irradiate an iguana into a giant monster that viciously attacks freighter ships in the Pacific Ocean. A team of experts, including Niko Tatopoulos, conclude that the oversized reptile is the culprit. Before long, the giant lizard

recommendations.title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
recommendations.overview: A giant alligator goes head to head with a giant Anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

recommendations.title: Smash and Grab
recommendations.overview: After years of toiling away inside the engine room of a towering locomotive, two antiquated robots will risk everything for freedom and for each other.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
